ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste CSL YAML failed: there is no text on the clipboard
ast.target: 粘贴 CSL YAML 失败：剪贴板中没有文本

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste CSL YAML failed: could not parse clipboard text as YAML
ast.target: 粘贴 CSL YAML 失败：无法将剪贴板文本解析为 YAML

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste CSL YAML failed: clipboard content does not look like CSL (expected object(s) with 'id' keys, optionally under a 'references' key)
ast.target: 粘贴 CSL YAML 失败：剪贴板内容不像 CSL（应为包含 'id' 键的对象，可选在 'references' 键下）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste CSL YAML failed: there is an existing 'references' field, but it is not an array
ast.target: 粘贴 CSL YAML 失败：已存在 'references' 字段，但它不是数组

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cite Reference failed: no references found in front matter
ast.target: 引用参考文献失败：在 front matter 中未找到参考文献
